requirement_topic.en: KC-EMC — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act + KN 14 series)
requirement_topic.zh: KC-EMC——家用制冷器具（《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》+ KN 14系列）
requirement_topic.zht: KC-EMC——家用製冷器具（《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》+ KN 14系列）

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the South Korean market must satisfy KC-EMC requirements administered under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (KATS/MOTIE) and the electromagnetic compatibility framework operated by the National Radio Research Agency (RRA). The applicable emission standard for household appliances (including refrigerators) is KN 14-1 (Korean national standard transposing CISPR 14-1, emission requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus) and the immunity standard is KN 14-2 (transposing CISPR 14-2). Where relevant, KN 61000-3-2 (harmonic current emissions) and KN 61000-3-3 (voltage fluctuations and flicker) apply as supplementary standards. KC-EMC conformity is demonstrated through testing at a KATS/RRA-recognised laboratory; for most household appliances this is registered under the KC mark together with the safety conformity, and the resulting KC-EMC registration is held by the manufacturer or its Korean importer.
summary.zh: 投放韩国市场的家用制冷器具须满足KC-EMC要求，该要求依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》（KATS/产业通商资源部）以及由国立电波研究院（RRA）运作的电磁兼容框架管理。适用于家用器具（包括电冰箱）的发射标准为KN 14-1（转化CISPR 14-1的韩国国家标准，家用器具、电动工具及类似器具的发射要求），抗扰度标准为KN 14-2（转化CISPR 14-2）。在相关情况下，KN 61000-3-2（谐波电流发射）和KN 61000-3-3（电压波动和闪烁）作为补充标准适用。KC-EMC符合性须通过KATS/RRA认可实验室检测予以证明；对大多数家用器具而言，该项与安全合格一并纳入KC标志登记，所得KC-EMC登记由制造商或其韩国进口商持有。
summary.zht: 投放韓國市場的家用製冷器具須滿足KC-EMC要求，該要求依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》（KATS/產業通商資源部）以及由國立電波研究院（RRA）運作的電磁相容框架管理。適用於家用器具（包括電冰箱）的發射標準為KN 14-1（轉化CISPR 14-1的韓國國家標準，家用器具、電動工具及類似器具的發射要求），抗擾度標準為KN 14-2（轉化CISPR 14-2）。在相關情況下，KN 61000-3-2（諧波電流發射）和KN 61000-3-3（電壓波動和閃爍）作為補充標準適用。KC-EMC符合性須通過KATS/RRA認可實驗室檢測予以證明；對大多數家用器具而言，該項與安全合格一併納入KC標誌登記，所得KC-EMC登記由製造商或其韓國進口商持有。

standards_or_laws: Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — KATS/MOTIE — EMC requirements for electrical appliances
KN 14-1 — Electromagnetic compatibility — Requirements for household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (Korean national standard transposing CISPR 14-1)
KN 14-2 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (transposing CISPR 14-2)
KN 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (≤ 16 A/phase input) — supplementary where applicable
KN 61000-3-3 — Voltage fluctuations and flicker — supplementary where applicable
RRA (National Radio Research Agency) — administration of KC-EMC conformity and recognised test laboratories

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory, equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (Part 2: Immunity — product family standard; recommended, equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Test reports generated by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories against GB 4343.1 are not directly accepted as the basis for a KC-EMC registration under the Korean Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、电动工具和类似器具的电磁骚扰特性——第1部分：发射限值和测量方法；强制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗扰度——产品族标准；推荐性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）执行。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。CNAS认可的中国实验室依据GB 4343.1出具的检测报告，不被直接接受作为韩国《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》框架下KC-EMC登记的依据。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（家用器具、電動工具和類似器具的電磁騷擾特性——第1部分：發射限值和測量方法；強制性，等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（第2部分：抗擾度——產品族標準；推薦性，等同CISPR 14-2:2015）執行。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性，等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。CNAS認可的中國實驗室依據GB 4343.1出具的檢測報告，不被直接接受作為韓國《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》框架下KC-EMC登記的依據。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission limits and measurement methods (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions ≤ 16 A/phase (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: Because both KN 14-1 and GB 4343.1 transpose the CISPR 14-1 family, the underlying limits and measurement methods are broadly aligned for many refrigerator types; the gaps are procedural and grid-related: (1) Re-registration obligation — KC-EMC conformity must reference the KN-designated standards and be supported by a test report from a KATS/RRA-recognised laboratory; a CNAS report cannot substitute without re-issuance, and the KC mark/registration is held by a Korean responsible party. (2) Grid difference — South Korea operates a 220 V / 60 Hz supply versus China's 220 V / 50 Hz; inverter-driven variable-speed compressors and switched-mode supplies may produce frequency-dependent conducted-emission and harmonic behaviour that differs at 60 Hz, so manufacturers should verify that existing 50 Hz GB 4343.1 / GB 17625.1 test configurations cover the 60 Hz operating point before attempting any data re-use. (3) Immunity coverage — confirm KN 14-2 immunity test coverage for inverter-controlled models.
gap.zh: 由于KN 14-1与GB 4343.1均转化自CISPR 14-1系列，对许多电冰箱类型而言基础限值和测量方法大体对齐；差距在于程序及电网层面：（1）重新登记义务——KC-EMC符合性须引用KN编号标准，并由KATS/RRA认可实验室出具检测报告予以支撑；CNAS报告未经重新签发不能替代，且KC标志/登记须由韩国责任主体持有。（2）电网差异——韩国采用220 V/60 Hz供电，而中国为220 V/50 Hz；变频压缩机及开关电源在60 Hz下的传导发射和谐波特性可能与频率相关而有所不同，制造商在尝试复用数据前应核实现有50 Hz的GB 4343.1/GB 17625.1测试配置是否涵盖60 Hz工作点。（3）抗扰度覆盖——核实变频控制型号的KN 14-2抗扰度测试覆盖情况。
gap.zht: 由於KN 14-1與GB 4343.1均轉化自CISPR 14-1系列，對許多電冰箱類型而言基礎限值和測量方法大體對齊；差距在於程序及電網層面：（1）重新登記義務——KC-EMC符合性須引用KN編號標準，並由KATS/RRA認可實驗室出具檢測報告予以支撐；CNAS報告未經重新簽發不能替代，且KC標誌/登記須由韓國責任主體持有。（2）電網差異——韓國採用220 V/60 Hz供電，而中國為220 V/50 Hz；變頻壓縮機及開關電源在60 Hz下的傳導發射和諧波特性可能與頻率相關而有所不同，製造商在嘗試複用數據前應核實現有50 Hz的GB 4343.1/GB 17625.1測試配置是否涵蓋60 Hz工作點。（3）抗擾度覆蓋——核實變頻控制型號的KN 14-2抗擾度測試覆蓋情況。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for the KC mark — KC-EMC conformity under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act is legally required for household refrigerators; KN 14-1 (emission) and KN 14-2 (immunity) are the applicable Korean national standards, administered with RRA
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC regime by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KC-EMC conformity under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Control Act is mandatory for South Korean market placement of household refrigerators. KN 14-1 (emission) and KN 14-2 (immunity) are the applicable Korean national standards. Chinese CCC EMC test data (GB 4343.1-2018) cannot be directly used for KC-EMC registration; testing at a KATS/RRA-recognised laboratory and a Korean-held KC registration are required. The 60 Hz Korean grid versus China's 50 Hz, and inverter-compressor models, warrant particular attention to KN 14 test coverage.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》的KC-EMC符合性是家用电冰箱投放韩国市场的强制要求。KN 14-1（发射）和KN 14-2（抗扰度）为适用的韩国国家标准。中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接用于KC-EMC登记；须在KATS/RRA认可实验室检测并由韩国主体持有KC登记。韩国60 Hz电网与中国50 Hz的差异及变频压缩机型号，尤须关注是否符合KN 14的检测覆盖要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》的KC-EMC符合性是家用電冰箱投放韓國市場的強制要求。KN 14-1（發射）和KN 14-2（抗擾度）為適用的韓國國家標準。中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據（GB 4343.1-2018）不能直接用於KC-EMC登記；須在KATS/RRA認可實驗室檢測並由韓國主體持有KC登記。韓國60 Hz電網與中國50 Hz的差異及變頻壓縮機型號，尤須關注是否符合KN 14的檢測覆蓋要求。
